channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [ULTRACEMCO] UltraTech Cement Ltd: Material Price Movement Noticed, No Triggering Event Found
item.description:
On Monday, 16th March, 2026, a material price movement (MPM) was observed in UltraTech Cement Ltd's share price. However, there was no event or information in the mainstream media that could have caused this movement. The company believes it was purely market-driven and is informing shareholders for their records.

  • Material price movement noticed in UltraTech Cement Ltd's share price
  • No event or information in the media that could have triggered the movement
  • Company believes the movement was market-driven

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ULTRATECH CEMENT LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [TIMEX] Timex Group India Ltd. Announces Interim Dividend Payment on Preference Shares
item.description:
Timex Group India Ltd. has announced a meeting of its Board of Directors on March 20, 2026, to consider the approval of an interim dividend payment on 2,29,00,000 13.88% Cumulative Redeemable Preference Shares. The dividend amount for each share is Rs. 13.88, amounting to a total dividend of Rs. 3,08,27,290. The record date for determining the eligible shareholders is fixed as March 20, 2026. The trading window for dealing in the company's shares will be closed from March 16, 2026, to March 22, 2026, due to the dividend declaration.

  • Timex Group India Ltd. to pay interim dividend on preference shares
  • Dividend amount per share is Rs. 13.88
  • Total dividend amount is Rs. 3,08,27,290
  • Record date for determining eligible shareholders is March 20, 2026
  • Trading window for dealing in shares to be closed from March 16, 2026, to March 22, 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: TIMEX GROUP INDIA LTD.-$ | Category: Dividend

item.title: [HINDUST] Typo Correction: Hindustan Agrigenetics Ltd Appoints Suresh Srinivasan as CFO
item.description:
Hindustan Agrigenetics Ltd has corrected an error in the name of its recently appointed Chief Financial Officer (CFO). The correct name of the appointee is Mr. Suresh Srinivasan, not 'Sursh Srinivasan' as previously mentioned in the intimation dated 14th March, 2026. The company clarifies that all other details provided in the earlier intimation remain unchanged.

  • Hindustan Agrigenetics Ltd corrects typographical error in CFO's name
  • Mr. Suresh Srinivasan is the correct name of the appointed CFO
  • No other details of the appointment have changed

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: HINDUSTAN AGRIGENETICS LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [CHCL] Cian Healthcare Ltd. Shifts Corporate Office to New Delhi
item.description:
Cian Healthcare Ltd. has announced the shifting of its corporate office from Pune to New Delhi, effective from March 16, 2026. The decision was made in a physical meeting of the Board of Directors, held on the same date, which commenced at 02:00 P.M. (IST) and concluded at 03:38 P.M. (IST). The new office address is Office No. 606, 6th Floor, Ring Road Mall, Sector 3, Rohini, New Delhi-110085, India.

  • Cian Healthcare Ltd. is shifting its corporate office from Pune to New Delhi.
  • The new office address is Office No. 606, 6th Floor, Ring Road Mall, Sector 3, Rohini, New Delhi-110085, India.
  • The shift will be effective from March 16, 2026.
  • The decision was made in a physical meeting of the Board of Directors on March 16, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Cian Healthcare Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [ANDHRACEMT] Sagar Cements Limited, Promoter of Andhra Cements Limited, Proposes to Sell Up to 66,76,843 Equity Shares through Stock Exchange Mechanism
item.description:
Sagar Cements Limited, the promoter of Andhra Cements Limited, has proposed to sell up to 66,76,843 Equity Shares of the Company, representing 7.24% of the total paid up equity share capital, through a separate, designated window of the BSE Limited and the National Stock Exchange of India Limited. The offer for sale (OFS) is being undertaken for achieving the minimum public shareholding in the Company as prescribed under Rule 19(2) (b) of the Securities Contracts (Regulation) Rules, 1957, as amended, and Regulation 38 of Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, as amended. The OFS will take place on March 17, 2026 ('T' day) and March 18, 2026 ('T+1' day).

  • Sagar Cements Limited, the promoter of Andhra Cements Limited, proposes to sell up to 66,76,843 Equity Shares of the Company.
  • The offer for sale (OFS) is being undertaken for achieving the minimum public shareholding in the Company as prescribed under SEBI regulations.
  • The OFS will take place on March 17, 2026 ('T' day) and March 18, 2026 ('T+1' day).
  • The offer represents 7.24% of the total paid up equity share capital of the Company.
  • The offer for sale will be conducted through a separate, designated window of the BSE Limited and the National Stock Exchange of India Limited.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ANDHRA CEMENTS LTD. | Category: Sale

item.title: [CHCL] Cian Healthcare Ltd Appoints New Key Managerial Personnel and Senior Management
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Cian Healthcare Ltd has appointed Ms. Kalyani Vijay Chordia as the Chief Financial Officer, and Mr. Chirag Mehta and Mr. Ravikant Chavan as Senior Management Personnel in Head-Operations and Information Technology (IT)-Head roles, respectively. The appointments were approved in a Board meeting on March 16, 2026.

  • Ms. Kalyani Vijay Chordia appointed as Chief Financial Officer
  • Mr. Chirag Mehta appointed as Head-Operations
  • Mr. Ravikant Chavan appointed as Information Technology (IT)-Head
  • Appointments effective from March 16, 2026
  • New key managerial personnel and senior management bring extensive experience in pharmaceutical, manufacturing, and IT sectors

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Cian Healthcare Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [IFINSEC] Revised Disclosure Received for Gopal Bansal HUF's Release of Pledge in India Finsec Ltd
item.description:
The Exchange has received a revised Disclosure under Regulation 31(1) and 31(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011 on March 16, 2026 for Gopal Bansal HUF. The disclosure is regarding the release of pledge of Equity Shares of M/s India Finsec Limited. The necessary information has been provided in the prescribed format.

  • Revised Disclosure received for Gopal Bansal HUF
  • Release of pledge of Equity Shares of M/s India Finsec Limited
  • Disclosure under Regulation 31(1) and 31(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: INDIA FINSEC LTD. | Category: Pledge

item.title: [HUIL] Hindusthan Urban Infrastructure Ltd Announces Equity Share Sub-division
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Hindusthan Urban Infrastructure Ltd has announced the sub-division of its equity shares. The 1 equity share of Rs. 10/- has been split into 5 equity shares of Rs. 2/- each. The sub-divided shares have been credited to the demat accounts of the shareholders by National Securities Depository Limited (NSDL) and Central Depository Services (India) Limited (CDSL). The corporate action was executed by Skyline Financial Services Private Limited, the R&T Agent/Registry Division of the company.

  • Hindusthan Urban Infrastructure Ltd has sub-divided its equity shares.
  • 1 equity share of Rs. 10/- has been split into 5 equity shares of Rs. 2/- each.
  • The sub-divided shares have been credited to the demat accounts by NSDL and CDSL.
  • The corporate action was executed by Skyline Financial Services Private Limited.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Hindusthan Urban Infrastructure Ltd | Category: Split

item.title: [MTPL] Marg Techno Projects Ltd to Increase Authorised Share Capital and Evaluate Fund Raising on March 20, 2026
item.description:
Marg Techno Projects Ltd has informed the BSE that their Board of Directors will meet on March 20, 2026, to consider increasing the company's authorized share capital and evaluate raising funds through various means, including preferential issue, rights issue, or other permissible modes. The meeting's agenda also includes other business items with the chair's permission and a majority of directors' approval. The company's trading window for dealing in securities will be closed for all designated persons from March 16, 2026, to March 20, 2026, in accordance with the Company’s Code of Conduct for Prevention of Insider Trading.

  • Marg Techno Projects Ltd to consider increasing authorized share capital
  • The company to evaluate fundraising through equity shares, warrants, or convertible securities
  • Meeting to be held on March 20, 2026, with other business items on the agenda
  • Trading window for dealing in securities to be closed for designated persons from March 16, 2026, to March 20, 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Marg Techno Projects Ltd | Category: Investment

item.title: [CHCL] Cian Healthcare Ltd: Board Approves Key Managerial Personnel for Materiality Determination & Designates Chairperson of the Board
item.description:
Cian Healthcare Ltd announced that its Board of Directors, in a meeting held on March 16, 2026, approved the granting of authorization to Key Managerial Personnel for determining the materiality of an event or information for disclosure purposes. The Board also approved the designation of Mr. Manish Goswami as the Chairperson of the Board for a tenure of 1 year, starting from March 16, 2026, based on the Nomination and Remuneration Committee's recommendation.

  • Board approves authorization for Key Managerial Personnel to determine materiality of events or information for disclosure
  • Cian Healthcare designates Mr. Manish Goswami as Chairperson of the Board for a tenure of 1 year

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Cian Healthcare Ltd | Category: Board Meeting
